---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jacobi-lafferty/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jacobilafferty
---

This is a Data Science based blog, using real data to explore ideas of Data Visualization
